author: lOrm
content: Partially landed: src/cli/repl/slash.rs:1517-1555 now defines trait PluginActionRunner with impl on PluginAction; handle_plugin_action shrunk to a one-line trampoline to action.apply(plugin_manager). This satisfies the OCP/Tell-Don't-Ask direction of the mandated refactor (variants own their dispatch; adding a variant changes one match arm instead of two callers). Full per-variant-struct decomposition + registry lookup was NOT done — the enum and the inner Marketplace string-keyed sub-dispatcher remain. Leaving open to track that finishing pass; if the registry layer is judged unnecessary, close as 'done by trait extraction'.
